title: ModernJapanCity
description: Create your own modern Japanese city.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b11c2493bf9cffbf09ba67413fb04be062dc34.png)

# 📖What is ModernJapanCity?
This mod contains all kinds of objects, etc. that exist in the streets of modern Japan, such as blocks.
By using this mod, you can recreate the streets of modern Japan in Minecraft.

**Note that this mod requires GeckoLib as a prerequisite mod.**

The supported languages are as follows.

Japanese / English

## ❓F.A.Q.
**Q. What does it mean when a traffic light cycles incorrectly?**

A. It is a malfunction that we have no control over on our side. Please ignore it because we don't know how to fix it.

**Q. The letters on the sign are crushed and unreadable.**

A. This is a measure to reduce file size.

**Q. I would like to propose a new block.**

A. We encourage you to join our Discord server. If your suggestion is accepted, it will be added.

**Q. I found a typo.**

A. Please report to the producer. We will fix it in the next update.
